Name: Max HP
Effects: Amount of damage you can take before dying
Negative stat effect: Acts like the stat is at 1

Name: HP Regeneration
Effects: Passive healing that restores 1 HP per n seconds, where the healing interval n becomes shorter with increasing HP Regeneration.  The first point of HP regeneration gives 0.20 HP/s and all further points increase it by 0.089 HP/s(details)
Negative stat effect: Acts like the stat is at 0

Name: Life Steal
Effects: Your attacks have a x% chance to heal you for 1HP.  The character's Life Steal chance is added to each weapon individually.
Limit: Can only trigger once per 0.1 second for a maximum of 10HP/second
Negative stat effect: Decreases the life steal chance of all weapons to minimum of 0

Name: Damage
Effects: Increases all damage dealt by 1% per point in Damage.  Does not affect Engineering structures.
Negative stat effect: Decreases damage by 1% per negative point instead. The minimum damage caused by a weapon or effect is always 1

Name: Melee Damage
Effects: Modifies the base attack damage of weapons, if their damage scales with Melee Damage.  Some items deal damage based on this stat.
Negative stat effect: Decreases the base attack damage. The minimum damage caused by a weapon or effect is always 1

Name: Ranged Damage
Effects: Modifies the base attack damage of weapons, if their damage scales with Ranged Damage.  Some items deal damage based on this stat.
Negative stat effect: Decreases the base attack damage. The minimum damage caused by a weapon or effect is always 1

Name: Elemental Damage
Effects: Modifies the base attack damage of weapons, if their damage scales with Elemental Damage.  Some items deal damage based on this stat.
Negative stat effect: Decreases the base attack damage. The minimum damage caused by a weapon or effect is always 1

Name: Attack Speed
Effects: You attack x% faster. Also applies to Ranged Weapons but not Structures
Limit: Diminishing Returns at higher values, can't attack faster than 12 times per second, slower for melee weapons.
Negative stat effect: You attack slower. Negative attack speed is calculated differently and doesn't impact you as much as positive attack speed.

Name: Crit Chance
Effects: Your weapons have an x increased chance to deal a critical hit.
Limit: Maximum 100% chance to do critical hits on a hit.
Negative stat effect: The amount is subtracted from the base crit chance of your weapon. Minimum is 0% chance in total to crit.

Name: Engineering
Effects: Increases the power of your structures. The other stats don't affect structures but specials do (piercing, bouncing, explosion etc.)
Negative stat effect: Your structures have x decreased power down to a minimum of 1 damage or healing

Name: Range
Effects: The max range of your weapons is increased by x. A higher range also increases the cooldown of melee weapons.(longer travel distance)
Negative stat effect: Your weapons have x less range. (Halved for melee weapons). Minimum of 25 range.

Name: Armor
Effects: You reduce incoming damage by x%. Each point of armor means it takes 6.66% more damage to kill you.
Negative stat effect: The damage you take is increased by x% instead of decreased.

Name: Dodge
Effects: You have a x% chance to dodge attacks.

Name: Speed
Negative stat effect: You move x% slower, coming to a standstill at -100% or more.

Name: Luck
Effects: You have an x% more chance of finding items or consumables when you kill enemies. Also increases the rarity of the items in the shop and level upgrades.
Negative stat effect: You have an x% less chance of finding items or consumables when you kill enemies. Also decreases the rarity of the items in the shop and level upgrades.

Name: Harvesting
Effects: You earn x materials and XP at the end of a wave. Increased by 5% every time it activates. (Rounded up)
Negative stat effect: You lose x materials and XP at the end of a wave. The 5% Increment doesn't happen.
